name: AnalysisBar.CardinalPointEnum
summary: The cardinal point types of the analysis bar.

enum_values.summary: The cardinal point is top left.

enum_values.name: CARDINAL_POINT_TOP_CENTER
enum_values.summary: The cardinal point is top center.

enum_values.name: CARDINAL_POINT_TOP_RIGHT
enum_values.summary: The cardinal point is top right.

enum_values.name: CARDINAL_POINT_MIDDLE_LEFT
enum_values.summary: The cardinal point is middle left.

enum_values.name: CARDINAL_POINT_MIDDLE_CENTER
enum_values.summary: The cardinal point is middle center.

enum_values.name: CARDINAL_POINT_MIDDLE_RIGHT
enum_values.summary: The cardinal point is middle right.

enum_values.name: CARDINAL_POINT_BOTTOM_LEFT
enum_values.summary: The cardinal point is bottom left.

enum_values.name: CARDINAL_POINT_BOTTOM_CENTER
enum_values.summary: The cardinal point is bottom center.

enum_values.name: CARDINAL_POINT_BOTTOM_RIGHT
enum_values.summary: The cardinal point is bottom right.
